column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
Why are they calling it a cyclone?

This was on google.
Hurricanes, cyclones, and typhoons are all large tropical storm systems that are essentially the same weather phenomenon, but they are given different names based on where they form:
Dramatic effect. It's the newest thing. Hurricane/Cyclone.
